'''bamatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabbanite|rabbanite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-m-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabbanite|rabbanite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bamatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæmæthæth|bæmæthæth]] || [[word:bæmæthæj|bæmæthæj]] || [[word:bæmæthæsh|bæmæthæsh]] || [[word:bæmæthæ|bæmæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bamamathath|bamamathath]] || [[word:bamamathaj|bamamathaj]] || [[word:bamamathash|bamamathash]] || [[word:bamamatha|bamamatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bamathath|bamathath]] || [[word:bamathaj|bamathaj]] || [[word:bamathash|bamathash]] || [[word:bamatha|bamatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bamafthath|bamafthath]] || [[word:bamafthaj|bamafthaj]] || [[word:bamafthash|bamafthash]] || [[word:bamafthaf|bamafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bamathatha|bamathatha]] || [[word:bamathaja|bamathaja]] || [[word:bamathasha|bamathasha]] || [[word:bamathaka|bamathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bamathath|bamathath]] || [[word:bamathaj|bamathaj]] || [[word:bamathash|bamathash]] || [[word:bamatha|bamatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bamathathal|bamathathal]] || [[word:bamathajal|bamathajal]] || [[word:bamathashal|bamathashal]] || [[word:bamathakal|bamathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bamathathatha|bamathathatha]] || [[word:bamathajaja|bamathajaja]] || [[word:bamathashasha|bamathashasha]] || [[word:bamathaka|bamathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bamathathan|bamathathan]] || [[word:bamathajan|bamathajan]] || [[word:bamathashan|bamathashan]] || [[word:bamathakan|bamathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bamathathaoro|bamathathaoro]] || [[word:bamathajaoro|bamathajaoro]] || [[word:bamathashaoro|bamathashaoro]] || [[word:bamathakaoro|bamathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
